title: Citrus Grove Incense Sticks
description: A refreshing blend of sun-ripened citrus, delicate florals, and green leaves. Awakens your senses and brightens your space.

aboutScent.body: Citrus Grove brings the feeling of a sunny morning into your home. The bright citrus top notes uplift your mood, while soft florals and warm woods create balance and calm.

packaging.body: Each set ships in a cream paper box with a subtle citrus label — minimal, gift-ready, and easy to store between burns.

howToUse.title: Light the tip
howToUse.body: Hold the stick at a slight angle and light the tip.

howToUse.title: Let it burn
howToUse.body: Let it burn for 5–10 seconds, then gently blow out the flame.

howToUse.title: Place & enjoy
howToUse.body: Place in an incense holder and enjoy the fragrance.

safetyTips: Keep out of reach of children and pets.

items.name: Emma L.
items.quote: The scent is so fresh and natural. Perfect for my morning routine. It helps me feel energized and focused!

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Not too strong, not too light. It fills the room beautifully and the burn time is perfect.

items.name: Daniel K.
items.quote: Beautiful packaging and amazing quality. I've tried many incense brands, this is my favorite.
